title: Luffy Refuses to Bow to Buggy
description: On pages 21–24, this part develops the danger of Buggy’s crew and the unstable alliance between Luffy, Zoro, and Nami.
scene: Orange Town becomes the stage for Nami’s schemes, Buggy’s violence, and Luffy’s refusal to act like a normal pirate.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: So, you want to be a pirate, do you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's just at the end of this street.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: THAT'S THE TAVERN WHERE THE PIRATES HANG OUT.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: So, what are we going to do there?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You let that thief get away!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: YOU'RE TELLING ME A LITTLE TARTORT OUTRAN THREE OF MY BEST MEN!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: BUT HER BOSS, THE GUY IN THE STRAW HAT, WAS REALLY STRONG!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: SHE JUST WALKED IN THE DOOR...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: MeAN... BELAY THAT! WHAT'S HER GAME!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Very well! Bring her to me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: C-CAP'N BUGGY! It's HIM! SHE'S WITH HIM!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: He's the guy who fell out of the sky!!

summary: The Orange Town conflict mixes Nami’s suspicious cleverness with Buggy’s theatrical cruelty. The section builds the unstable alliance that will oppose Buggy’s crew.
